Tiefling, Abyssal.name: Tiefling, Abyssal
Tiefling, Abyssal.description:
@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixSpeci.JournalEntryPage.phbspTiefling000 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Abyssal

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixSpeci.JournalEntryPage.phbspAbyssalTief inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Tiefling Traits

Creature Type: Humanoide

Tamanho: Medium (about 4–7 feet tall) or Small (about 3–4 feet tall), escolhido ao selecionar esta espécie

Deslocamento: 9 metros

As a Tiefling, you have the following special traits.

Visão no Escuro. Você tem visão no escuro com distância de 18 metros.

Fiendish Legacy. You are the recipient of a legacy that grants you supernatural abilities.

When you reach character levels 3 and 5, you learn a higher-level spell, as shown on the table. You always have that spell prepared. You can cast it once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast it in that way when you finish a Long Rest. You can also cast the spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait (choose the ability when you select the legacy).

Otherworldly Presence. You know the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplThaumaturg]{Taumaturgia} cantrip. When you cast it with this trait, the spell uses the same spellcasting ability you use for your Fiendish Legacy trait.

Abyssal Legacy Traits
Level 1Level 3Level 5
You have Resistance to Poison damage. You also know the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPoisonSpra]{Poison Spray} cantrip.@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplRayofSickn]{Ray of Sickness}@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHoldPerson]{Hold Person}

Tiefling, Chthonic.name: Tiefling, Chthonic
Tiefling, Chthonic.description:
@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixSpeci.JournalEntryPage.phbspTiefling000 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Chthonic

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixSpeci.JournalEntryPage.phbspChthonicTie inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Tiefling Traits

Creature Type: Humanoide

Tamanho: Medium (about 4–7 feet tall) or Small (about 3–4 feet tall), escolhido ao selecionar esta espécie

Deslocamento: 9 metros

As a Tiefling, you have the following special traits.

Visão no Escuro. Você tem visão no escuro com distância de 18 metros.

Fiendish Legacy. You are the recipient of a legacy that grants you supernatural abilities.

When you reach character levels 3 and 5, you learn a higher-level spell, as shown on the table. You always have that spell prepared. You can cast it once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast it in that way when you finish a Long Rest. You can also cast the spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait (choose the ability when you select the legacy).

Otherworldly Presence. You know the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplThaumaturg]{Taumaturgia} cantrip. When you cast it with this trait, the spell uses the same spellcasting ability you use for your Fiendish Legacy trait.

Fiendish Legacies
Level 1Level 3Level 5
You have Resistance to Necrotic damage.You also know the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplChillTouch]{Chill Touch} cantrip.@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFalseLife0]{False Life}@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplRayofEnfee]{Ray of Enfeeblement}

Dragonborn.name: Dragonborn
Dragonborn.description:
@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixSpeci.JournalEntryPage.phbspDragonborn0 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Dragonborn Traits

Tipo de Criatura: Humanoide

Tamanho: Médio (de 1,5 a 2 metros de altura)

Deslocamento: 9 metros

Como um draconato, você tem os seguintes traços especiais.

Ancestralidade Dracônica. Sua linhagem procede de um progenitor dragão. Escolha o tipo de dragão na tabela Ancestrais Dracônicos. Sua escolha afeta seu Sopro e traços de Resistência a Dano, bem como sua aparência.

Ancestrais Dracônicos
DragãoTipo de DanoDragãoTipo de Dano
AzulElétricoNegroÁcido
BrancoGélidoOuroÍgneo
BronzeElétricoPrataGélido
CobreÁcidoVerdeVenenoso
LatãoÍgneoVermelhoÍgneo

Sopro. When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can replace one of your attacks with an exhalation of magical energy in either a 15-foot Cone or a 30-foot Line that is 5 feet wide (choose the shape each time). Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Constitution modifier and Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, a creature takes 1d10 damage of the type determined by your Draconic Ancestry trait. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage. This damage increases by 1d10 when you reach character levels 5 (2d10), 11 (3d10), and 17 (4d10).You can use this Breath Weapon a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

Resistência a Dano. Você tem Resistência ao tipo de dano determinado por seu traço Ancestralidade Dracônica.

Visão no Escuro. Você tem visão no escuro com distância de 18 metros.

Voo Dracônico. No nível 5 do personagem, você pode canalizar magia dracônica para voar temporariamente. Como uma Ação Bônus, asas espectrais brotam das suas costas e duram 10 minutos, até que você as retraia (nenhuma ação é necessária) ou obtenha a condição incapacitado. Pela duração, você tem um Deslocamento de Voo igual ao seu Deslocamento. Suas asas parecem feitas da mesma energia que o seu Sopro. Após usar esse traço, você não pode usá-lo novamente até completar um Descanso Longo.

Elf, Drow.name: Elf, Drow
Elf, Drow.description:
@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixSpeci.JournalEntryPage.phbspElf00000000 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Drow

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixSpeci.JournalEntryPage.phbspDrow0000000 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Elf Traits

Creature Type: Humanoide

Tamanho: Médio (de 1,5 a 1,8 metro de altura)

Deslocamento: 9 metros

As an Elf, you have these special traits.

Visão no Escuro. Você tem visão no escuro com distância de 18 metros.

Elven Lineage. You are part of a lineage that grants you supernatural abilities.

When you reach character levels 3 and 5, you learn a higher-level spell, as shown on the table. You always have that spell prepared. You can cast it once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast it in that way when you finish a Long Rest. You can also cast the spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait (choose the ability when you select the lineage).

Drow Lineage Features
Level 1Level 3Level 5
The range of your Darkvision increases to 120 feet. You also know the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDancingLig]{Dancing Lights} cantrip.@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFaerieFire]{Fogo das Fadas}@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDarkness00]{Darkness}

Fey Ancestry. You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the &Reference[Charmed] condition.

Keen Senses. You have proficiency in the Insight, Perception, or Survival skill.

Trance. You don't need to sleep, and magic can't put you to sleep. You can finish a Long Rest in 4 hours if you spend those hours in a trancelike meditation, during which you retain consciousness.

Dwarf.name: Dwarf
Dwarf.description:
@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixSpeci.JournalEntryPage.phbspDwarf000000 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Dwarf Traits

Tipo de Criatura: Humanoide

Tamanho: Medium (about 4–5 feet tall)

Deslocamento: 9 metros

As a Dwarf, you have these special traits.

Visão no Escuro. Você tem visão no escuro com distância de 36 metros.

Dwarven Resilience. You have Resistance to Poison damage. You also have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Poisoned condition.

Dwarven Toughness. Your Hit Point maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 again whenever you gain a level.

Stonecunning. As a Bonus Action, you gain Tremorsense with a range of 60 feet for 10 minutes. You must be on a stone surface or touching a stone surface to use this Tremorsense. The stone can be natural or worked.You can use this Bonus Action a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

Gnome, Forest.name: Gnome, Forest
Gnome, Forest.description:
@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixSpeci.JournalEntryPage.phbspGnome000000 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Gnome Traits

Tipo de Criatura: Humanoide

Tamanho: Small (about 3–4 feet tall)

Deslocamento: 9 metros

As a Gnome, you have these special traits.

Visão no Escuro. Você tem visão no escuro com distância de 18 metros.

Gnomish Cunning. You have Advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws.

Gnomish Lineage. You are part of a lineage that grants you supernatural abilities. Whichever lineage you choose, Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait (choose the ability when you select the lineage):

Forest Gnome. You know the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMinorIllus]{Minor Illusion} cantrip. You also always have the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplSpeakwithA]{Speak with Animals} spell prepared. You can cast it without a spell slot a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest. You can also use any spell slots you have to cast the spell.

Goliath.name: Goliath
Goliath.description:
@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixSpeci.JournalEntryPage.phbspGoliath0000 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Goliath Traits

Tipo de Criatura: Humanoide

Tamanho: Medium (about 7–8 feet tall)

Deslocamento: 35 feet

As a Goliath, you have these special traits.

Giant Ancestry. You are descended from Giants. Choose one of the following benefits—a supernatural boon from your ancestry; you can use the chosen benefit a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest:

Cloud's Jaunt (Cloud Giant). As a Bonus Action, you magically teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

Fire's Burn (Fire Giant). When you hit a target with an attack roll and deal damage to it, you can also deal 1d10 Fire damage to that target.

Frost's Chill (Frost Giant). When you hit a target with an attack roll and deal damage to it, you can also deal 1d6 Cold damage to that target and reduce its Speed by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.

Hill's Tumble (Hill Giant). When you hit a Large or smaller creature with an attack roll and deal damage to it, you can give that target the &Reference[Prone] condition.

Stone's Endurance (Stone Giant). When you take damage, you can take a Reaction to roll 1d12. Add your Constitution modifier to the number rolled and reduce the damage by that total.

Storm's Thunder (Storm Giant). When you take damage from a creature within 60 feet of you, you can take a Reaction to deal 1d8 Thunder damage to that creature.

Large Form. Starting at character level 5, you can change your size to Large as a Bonus Action if you're in a big enough space. This transformation lasts for 10 minutes or until you end it (no action required). For that duration, you have Advantage on Strength checks, and your Speed increases by 10 feet. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

Powerful Build. You have Advantage on any ability check you make to end the Grappled condition. You also count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity.

Halfling.name: Halfling
Halfling.description:
@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixSpeci.JournalEntryPage.phbspHalfling000 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Halfling Traits

Tipo de Criatura: Humanoide

Tamanho: Small (about 2–3 feet tall)

Deslocamento: 9 metros

As a Halfling, you have these special traits.

Brave. You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Frightened condition.

Halfling Nimbleness. You can move through the space of any creature that is a size larger than you, but you can't stop in the same space.

Luck. When you roll a 1 on the d20 of a D20 Test, you can reroll the die, and you must use the new roll.

Naturally Stealthy. You can take the Hide action even when you are obscured only by a creature that is at least one size larger than you.

Elf, High.name: Elfo, Alto
Elf, High.description:
@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixSpeci.JournalEntryPage.phbspElf00000000 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Altos Elfos

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixSpeci.JournalEntryPage.phbspHighElf0000 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Traços Raciais dos Elfos

Tipo de Criatura: Humanoide

Tamanho: Médio (de 1,5 a 1,8 metro de altura)

Deslocamento: 9 metros

Como um elfo, você possui esses traços especiais.

Ancestralidade Feérica. Você tem vantagem em salvaguardas para evitar ou encerrar a condição enfeitiçado.

Linhagem Élfica. Você faz parte de uma linhagem que lhe concede habilidades sobrenaturais.

Quando você atingte os níveis 3 e 5, você aprende uma magia de círculo mais alto, como indicado na tabela. Você sempre tem esta magia preparada. Você pode conjurá-la uma vez sem um espaço de magia, e recupera a habilidade de conjurá-la dessa forma ao final de um descanso longo. Você também pode conjurar a magia usando quaisquer espaços de magia do círculo apropriado que tiver. Carisma, Inteligência ou Sabedoria são seu atributo de conjuração para as magias que você conjura com este traço (escolha a habilidade ao selecionar a linhagem).

Traços de Linhagem de Alto Elfo
Nível 1Nível 3Nível 5
Você sabe o truque @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPrestidigi]{prestidigitação arcana}. Sempre que você terminar um descanso longo, você pode substituir esse truque por outro da @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.6AnqLUowgdsqMFvz]{lista de magias de mago}.@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectMagi]{Detectar magia}@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMistyStep0]{Passo nebuloso}

Sentidos Aguçados. Você tem proficiência na perícia Intuição, Percepção ou Sobrevivência.

Transe. Você não precisa dormir, e magia não pode fazer você dormir. Você pode concluir um descanso longo em 4 horas se passar essas horas meditando em transe, durante o qual você se mantém consciente.

Visão no Escuro. Você tem visão no escuro com distância de 18 metros.

Human.name: Humano
Human.description:
@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixSpeci.JournalEntryPage.phbspHuman000000 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Traços Raciais Humanos

Tipo de Criatura: Humanoide

Tamanho: Médio (de 1,2 a 2 metros de altura) ou Pequeno (de 0,5 a 1,2 metro de altura), escolhido ao selecionar esta espécie

Deslocamento: 9 metros

Como um humano você tem os seguintes traços especiais.

Engenhoso. Você ganha inspiração heroica sempre que você terminar um descanso longo.

Habil. Você ganha proficiência em uma perícia, à sua escolha.

Versátil. Você ganha um talento de origem, à sua escolha (veja capítulo 5). Habilidoso é recomendável.

Tiefling, Infernal.name: Tiefling, Infernal
Tiefling, Infernal.description:
@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixSpeci.JournalEntryPage.phbspTiefling000 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Infernal

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixSpeci.JournalEntryPage.phbspInfernalTie inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Tiefling Traits

Creature Type: Humanoide

Tamanho: Medium (about 4–7 feet tall) or Small (about 3–4 feet tall), escolhido ao selecionar esta espécie

Deslocamento: 9 metros

As a Tiefling, you have the following special traits.

Visão no Escuro. Você tem visão no escuro com distância de 18 metros.

Fiendish Legacy. You are the recipient of a legacy that grants you supernatural abilities.

When you reach character levels 3 and 5, you learn a higher-level spell, as shown on the table. You always have that spell prepared. You can cast it once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast it in that way when you finish a Long Rest. You can also cast the spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait (choose the ability when you select the legacy).

Otherworldly Presence. You know the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplThaumaturg]{Taumaturgia} cantrip. When you cast it with this trait, the spell uses the same spellcasting ability you use for your Fiendish Legacy trait.

Fiendish Legacies
Level 1Level 3Level 5
You have Resistance to Fire damage. You also know the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFireBolt00]{Fire Bolt} cantrip.@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHellishReb]{Hellish Rebuke}@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDarkness00]{Darkness}

Orc.name: Orc
Orc.description:
@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixSpeci.JournalEntryPage.phbspOrc00000000 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Orc Traits

Tipo de Criatura: Humanoide

Tamanho: Medium (about 6–7 feet tall)

Deslocamento: 9 metros

As an Orc, you have these special traits.

Adrenaline Rush. You can take the Dash action as a Bonus Action. When you do so, you gain a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus. You can use this trait a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Short or Long Rest.

Visão no Escuro. Você tem visão no escuro com distância de 36 metros.

Relentless Endurance. When you are reduced to 0 Hit Points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 Hit Point instead. Once you use this trait, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

Gnome, Rock.name: Gnome, Rock
Gnome, Rock.description:
@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixSpeci.JournalEntryPage.phbspGnome000000 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Gnome Traits

Tipo de Criatura: Humanoide

Tamanho: Small (about 3–4 feet tall)

Deslocamento: 9 metros

As a Gnome, you have these special traits.

Visão no Escuro. Você tem visão no escuro com distância de 18 metros.

Gnomish Cunning. You have Advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws.

Gnomish Lineage. You are part of a lineage that grants you supernatural abilities. Whichever lineage you choose, Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait (choose the ability when you select the lineage):

Rock Gnome. You know the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMending000]{Mending} e @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPrestidigi]{Prestidigitation} cantrips. In addition, you can spend 10 minutes casting Prestidigitation to create a Tiny clockwork device (AC 5, 1 HP), such as a toy, fire starter, or music box. When you create the device, you determine its function by choosing one effect from Prestidigitation; the device produces that effect whenever you or another creature takes a Bonus Action to activate it with a touch. If the chosen effect has options within it, you choose one of those options for the device when you create it. For example, if you choose the spell's ignite-extinguish effect, you determine whether the device ignites or extinguishes fire; the device doesn't do both. You can have three such devices in existence at a time, and each falls apart 8 hours after its creation or when you dismantle it with a touch as a Utilize action.

Elf, Wood.name: Elf, Wood
Elf, Wood.description:
@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixSpeci.JournalEntryPage.phbspElf00000000 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Wood Elves

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbAppendixSpeci.JournalEntryPage.phbspWoodElf0000 inline classes="free-rules-embed"]

Elf Traits

Creature Type: Humanoide

Tamanho: Médio (de 1,5 a 1,8 metro de altura)

Deslocamento: 9 metros

As an Elf, you have these special traits.

Visão no Escuro. Você tem visão no escuro com distância de 18 metros.

Elven Lineage. You are part of a lineage that grants you supernatural abilities.

When you reach character levels 3 and 5, you learn a higher-level spell, as shown on the table. You always have that spell prepared. You can cast it once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast it in that way when you finish a Long Rest. You can also cast the spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait (choose the ability when you select the lineage).

Wood Elf Lineage Features
Level 1Level 3Level 5
Your Speed increases to 35 feet. You also know the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDruidcraft]{Arte druídica} cantrip.@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLongstride]{Longstrider}@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPasswithou]{Pass without Trace}

Fey Ancestry. You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Charmed condition.

Keen Senses. You have proficiency in the Insight, Perception, or Survival skill.

Trance. You don't need to sleep, and magic can't put you to sleep. You can finish a Long Rest in 4 hours if you spend those hours in a trancelike meditation, during which you retain consciousness.

Fiendish Legacy, Abyssal.name: Fiendish Legacy, Abyssal
Fiendish Legacy, Abyssal.description:
You are the recipient of a legacy that grants you supernatural abilities.

When you reach character levels 3 and 5, you learn a higher-level spell, as shown on the table. You always have that spell prepared. You can cast it once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast it in that way when you finish a Long Rest. You can also cast the spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait (choose the ability when you select the legacy).

Abyssal

The entropy of the Abyss, the chaos of Pandemonium, and the despair of Carceri call to tieflings who have the abyssal legacy. Horns, fur, tusks, and peculiar scents are common physical features of such tieflings, most of whom have the blood of demons coursing through their veins.

Abyssal Legacy Traits
Level 1Level 3Level 5
You have Resistance to Poison damage. You also know the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPoisonSpra]{Poison Spray} cantrip.@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplRayofSickn]{Ray of Sickness}@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHoldPerson]{Hold Person}

Nota do Foundry

The Resistance and spells are granted to you automatically and you will be prompted to choose the spellcasting ability during advancement.

Adrenaline Rush.name: Adrenaline Rush
Adrenaline Rush.description: You can take the Dash action as a Bonus Action. When you do so, you gain a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus. You can use this trait a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Short or Long Rest.

Brave.name: Brave
Brave.description: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the &Reference[Frightened] condition.

Breath Weapon.name: Sopro
Breath Weapon.description:
When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can replace one of your attacks with an exhalation of magical energy in either a 15-foot Cone or a 30-foot Line that is 5 feet wide (choose the shape each time). Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Constitution modifier and Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, a creature takes 1d10 damage of the type determined by your Draconic Ancestry trait. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage. This damage increases by 1d10 when you reach character levels 5 (2d10), 11 (3d10), and 17 (4d10).You can use this Breath Weapon a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

Nota do Foundry

As atividades Sopro (Cone) e Sopro (Linha) estão ambas configuradas de acordo com seu modelo e incluem o tipo de dano. O dano também aumenta à medida que você sobe de nível.

Você pode selecionar o tipo de dano na caixa de diálogo do lançamento de dano. O sistema lembrará sua escolha posteriormente. Você pode editar as atividades para remover os outros tipos de dano e assim pular essa etapa.

Fiendish Legacy, Chthonic.name: Fiendish Legacy, Chthonic
Fiendish Legacy, Chthonic.description:
You are the recipient of a legacy that grants you supernatural abilities.

When you reach character levels 3 and 5, you learn a higher-level spell, as shown on the table. You always have that spell prepared. You can cast it once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast it in that way when you finish a Long Rest. You can also cast the spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait (choose the ability when you select the legacy).

Chthonic

Tieflings who have the chthonic legacy feel not only the tug of Carceri but also the greed of Gehenna and the gloom of Hades. Some of these tieflings look cadaverous. Others possess the unearthly beauty of a succubus, or they have physical features in common with a night hag, a yugoloth, or some other Neutral Evil fiendish ancestor.

Chthonic Legacy Traits
Level 1Level 3Level 5
You have Resistance to Necrotic damage.You also know the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplChillTouch]{Chill Touch} cantrip.@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFalseLife0]{False Life}@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplRayofEnfee]{Ray of Enfeeblement}

Nota do Foundry

The Resistance and spells are granted to you automatically and you will be prompted to choose the spellcasting ability during advancement.

Cloud's Jaunt.name: Cloud's Jaunt
Cloud's Jaunt.description: As a Bonus Action, you magically teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

Draconic Flight.name: Voo Dracônico
Draconic Flight.description:
No nível 5 do personagem, você pode canalizar magia dracônica para voar temporariamente. Como uma Ação Bônus, asas espectrais brotam das suas costas e duram 10 minutos, até que você as retraia (nenhuma ação é necessária) ou obtenha a condição incapacitado. Pela duração, você tem um Deslocamento de Voo igual ao seu Deslocamento. Suas asas parecem feitas da mesma energia que o seu Sopro. Após usar esse traço, você não pode usá-lo novamente até completar um Descanso Longo.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes an Active Effect for tracking but it does not automatically grant the Fly Speed.

Elven Lineage, Drow.name: Elven Lineage, Drow
Elven Lineage, Drow.description:
You are part of a lineage that grants you supernatural abilities.

When you reach character levels 3 and 5, you learn a higher-level spell, as shown on the table. You always have that spell prepared. You can cast it once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast it in that way when you finish a Long Rest. You can also cast the spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait (choose the ability when you select the lineage).

Drow Lineage Features

Level 1

Level 3

Level 5

The range of your Darkvision increases to 120 feet. You also know the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDancingLig]{Dancing Lights} cantrip.

@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFaerieFire]{Fogo das Fadas}

@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDarkness00]{Darkness}

Nota do Foundry

You will automatically be granted the relevant features and spells when you select the species and as you level up.

Dwarven Resilience.name: Dwarven Resilience
Dwarven Resilience.description:
You have Resistance to Poison damage. You also have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Poisoned condition.

Nota do Foundry

You will automatically be granted Resistance to Poison damage but not Advantage on saving throws to avoid/end the Poisoned condition.

Dwarven Toughness.name: Dwarven Toughness
Dwarven Toughness.description:
Your Hit Point maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 again whenever you gain a level.

Nota do Foundry

The Hit Point maximum increase is handled automatically each level.

Fey Ancestry.name: Ancestralidade Feérica
Fey Ancestry.description: Você tem vantagem em salvaguardas para evitar ou encerrar a condição &Reference[Charmed] .

Fire's Burn.name: Fire's Burn
Fire's Burn.description: When you hit a target with an attack roll and deal damage to it, you can also deal 1d10 Fire damage to that target.

Gnomish Lineage, Forest.name: Gnomish Lineage, Forest
Gnomish Lineage, Forest.description:
You know the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMinorIllus]{Minor Illusion} cantrip. You also always have the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplSpeakwithA]{Speak with Animals} spell prepared. You can cast it without a spell slot a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest. You can also use any spell slots you have to cast the spell.

Nota do Foundry

The free castings are included in the spell.

Frost's Chill.name: Frost's Chill
Frost's Chill.description:
When you hit a target with an attack roll and deal damage to it, you can also deal 1d6 Cold damage to that target and reduce its Speed by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes an Active Effect which can be used for tracking and reduces their Speed by 10.

Giant Ancestry.name: Giant Ancestry
Giant Ancestry.description:
You are descended from Giants. Choose one of the following benefits—a supernatural boon from your ancestry; you can use the chosen benefit a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest:

Cloud's Jaunt (Cloud Giant). As a Bonus Action, you magically teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

Fire's Burn (Fire Giant). When you hit a target with an attack roll and deal damage to it, you can also deal 1d10 Fire damage to that target.

Frost's Chill (Frost Giant). When you hit a target with an attack roll and deal damage to it, you can also deal 1d6 Cold damage to that target and reduce its Speed by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.

Hill's Tumble (Hill Giant). When you hit a Large or smaller creature with an attack roll and deal damage to it, you can give that target the Prone condition.

Stone's Endurance (Stone Giant). When you take damage, you can take a Reaction to roll 1d12. Add your Constitution modifier to the number rolled and reduce the damage by that total.

Storm's Thunder (Storm Giant). When you take damage from a creature within 60 feet of you, you can take a Reaction to deal 1d8 Thunder damage to that creature.

Gnomish Cunning.name: Gnomish Cunning
Gnomish Cunning.description: You have Advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws.

Gnomish Cunning.name: Gnomish Cunning
Gnomish Cunning.description: You have Advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws.

Halfling Nimbleness.name: Halfling Nimbleness
Halfling Nimbleness.description: You can move through the space of any creature that is a size larger than you, but you can't stop in the same space.

Elven Lineage, High Elf.name: Linhagem Élfica, Alto Elfo
Elven Lineage, High Elf.description:
Você faz parte de uma linhagem que lhe concede habilidades sobrenaturais.

Quando você atingte os níveis 3 e 5, você aprende uma magia de círculo mais alto, como indicado na tabela. Você sempre tem essa magia preparada. Você sempre tem esta magia preparada. Você pode conjurá-la uma vez sem um espaço de magia, e recupera a habilidade de conjurá-la dessa forma ao final de um descanso longo. Você também pode conjurar a magia usando quaisquer espaços de magia do círculo apropriado que tiver. Carisma, Inteligência ou Sabedoria são seu atributo de conjuração para as magias que você conjura com este traço (escolha a habilidade ao selecionar a linhagem).

Linhagens Élficas
Nível 1Nível 3Nível 5
Você sabe o truque @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPrestidigi]{prestidigitação arcana}. Sempre que você terminar um descanso longo, você pode substituir este truque por outro da lista de magias de Mago.@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectMagi]{Detectar Magia}@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMistyStep0]{Passo nebuloso}

Nota do Foundry

Você receberá automaticamente as habilidades e magias correspondentes ao selecionar a espécie e à medida que subir de nível.

Hill's Tumble.name: Hill's Tumble
Hill's Tumble.description: When you hit a Large or smaller creature with an attack roll and deal damage to it, you can give that target the &Reference[Prone] condition.

Fiendish Legacy, Infernal.name: Fiendish Legacy, Infernal
Fiendish Legacy, Infernal.description:
You are the recipient of a legacy that grants you supernatural abilities.

When you reach character levels 3 and 5, you learn a higher-level spell, as shown on the table. You always have that spell prepared. You can cast it once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast it in that way when you finish a Long Rest. You can also cast the spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait (choose the ability when you select the legacy).

Infernal

The infernal legacy connects tieflings not only to Gehenna but also the Nine Hells and the raging battlefields of Acheron. Horns, spines, tails, golden eyes, and a faint odor of sulfur or smoke are common physical features of such tieflings, most of whom trace their ancestry to devils.

Infernal Legacy Traits
Level 1Level 3Level 5
You have Resistance to Fire damage. You also know the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplFireBolt00]{Fire Bolt} cantrip.@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHellishReb]{Hellish Rebuke}@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDarkness00]{Darkness}

Nota do Foundry

The Resistance and spells are granted to you automatically and you will be prompted to choose the spellcasting ability during advancement.

Keen Senses.name: Sentidos Aguçados
Keen Senses.description:
Você tem proficiência na perícia Intuição, Percepção ou Sobrevivência.

Nota do Foundry

Após selecionar essa espécie, será solicitado que você faça sua escolha.

Large Form.name: Large Form
Large Form.description:
Starting at character level 5, you can change your size to Large as a Bonus Action if you're in a big enough space. This transformation lasts for 10 minutes or until you end it (no action required). For that duration, you have Advantage on Strength checks, and your Speed increases by 10 feet. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes an Active Effect which automates the increase to your Speed and the Advantage on Strength checks.

Large Form.name: Large Form
Large Form.description: For the duration, you have Advantage on Strength checks, and your Speed increases by 10 feet. Once you use this trait, you can’t use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

Luck.name: Luck
Luck.description: When you roll a 1 on the d20 of a D20 Test, you can reroll the die, and you must use the new roll.

Naturally Stealthy.name: Naturally Stealthy
Naturally Stealthy.description: You can take the &Reference[Hide] action even when you are obscured only by a creature that is at least one size larger than you.

Otherworldly Presence.name: Otherworldly Presence
Otherworldly Presence.description:
You know the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplThaumaturg]{Taumaturgia} cantrip. When you cast it with this trait, the spell uses the same spellcasting ability you use for your Fiendish legacy trait.

Nota do Foundry

When you're granted this spell it will allow you to choose your spellcasting ability.

Powerful Build.name: Powerful Build
Powerful Build.description:
You have Advantage on any ability check you make to end the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition. You also count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes an Active Effect which automatically upgrades your size when determining carrying capacity.

Relentless Endurance.name: Relentless Endurance
Relentless Endurance.description: When you are reduced to 0 Hit Points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 Hit Point instead. Once you use this trait, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

Resourceful.name: Engenhoso
Resourceful.description: Você ganha inspiração heroica sempre que você terminar um descanso longo.

Gnomish Lineage, Rock.name: Gnomish Lineage, Rock
Gnomish Lineage, Rock.description: You know the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplMending000]{Mending} e @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPrestidigi]{Prestidigitation} cantrips. In addition, you can spend 10 minutes casting Prestidigitation to create a Tiny clockwork device (AC 5, 1 HP), such as a toy, fire starter, or music box. When you create the device, you determine its function by choosing one effect from Prestidigitation; the device produces that effect whenever you or another creature takes a Bonus Action to activate it with a touch. If the chosen effect has options within it, you choose one of those options for the device when you create it. For example, if you choose the spell's ignite-extinguish effect, you determine whether the device ignites or extinguishes fire; the device doesn't do both. You can have three such devices in existence at a time, and each falls apart 8 hours after its creation or when you dismantle it with a touch as a Utilize action.

Skillful.name: Hábil
Skillful.description:
Você ganha proficiência em uma perícia, à sua escolha.

Nota do Foundry

Você será solicitado a fazer essa escolha ao selecionar esta espécie.

Stonecunning.name: Stonecunning
Stonecunning.description:
As a Bonus Action, you gain &Reference[Tremorsense] with a range of 60 feet for 10 minutes. You must be on a stone surface or touching a stone surface to use this Tremorsense. The stone can be natural or worked. You can use this Bonus Action a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

Nota do Foundry

This feature includes the limited uses and an Active Effect that grants you the 60 feet of Tremorsense. It does not automatically update your Token's vision settings.

Stone's Endurance.name: Stone's Endurance
Stone's Endurance.description: When you take damage, you can take a Reaction to roll 1d12. Add your Constitution modifier to the number rolled and reduce the damage by that total.

Storm's Thunder.name: Storm's Thunder
Storm's Thunder.description: When you take damage from a creature within 60 feet of you, you can take a Reaction to deal 1d8 Thunder damage to that creature.

Trance.name: Transe
Trance.description: Você não precisa dormir, e magia não pode fazer você dormir. Você pode concluir um descanso longo em 4 horas se passar essas horas meditando em transe, durante o qual você se mantém consciente.

Versatile.name: Versátil
Versatile.description:
Você ganha um @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.otAeQs0TLHYIBNuj]{talento de origem}, à sua escolha @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.feats24.Item.phbftSkilled0000]{Habilidoso} é recomendado.

Nota do Foundry

Será solicitado que você faça sua escolha ao selecionar esta espécie.

Elven Lineage, Wood Elf.name: Elven Lineage, Wood Elf
Elven Lineage, Wood Elf.description:
You are part of a lineage that grants you supernatural abilities.

When you reach character levels 3 and 5, you learn a higher-level spell, as shown on the table. You always have that spell prepared. You can cast it once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast it in that way when you finish a Long Rest. You can also cast the spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait (choose the ability when you select the lineage).

Wood Elf Lineage Features
Level 1Level 3Level 5
Your Speed increases to 35 feet. You also know the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDruidcraft]{Arte druídica} cantrip.@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLongstride]{Longstrider}@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPasswithou]{Pass without Trace}

Nota do Foundry

You will automatically be granted the relevant features and spells when you select the species and as you level up.
